import io
import string
import list

fn tokenize(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i <= n
    mut b = 32
    mut at_end = false
    if i >= n
      at_end = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(x)
        b = x
      when None
        at_end = true
      end
    end
    mut is_ws = false
    if at_end
      is_ws = true
    else if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      is_ws = true
    end
    if is_ws
      if string.len(cur) > 0
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn read_one() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_one()
let line2 = read_one()
let xs = tokenize(line1)
let ys = tokenize(line2)
let n = xs.len()
mut k = 0
while k < n
  match xs.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    match ys.get(k)
    when Some(y)
      print("#{x}+#{y}=#{x + y}")
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end
